name: player_weight under a crafted year_offset range ignores the offset (year-less source guard)
description: player_weight is a year-less base-player column (grain 'player'). A hand-crafted year_offset:[1,2] cannot map to a season window; the guard renders the plain value instead of the prior SUM(player.weight) FROM player WHERE pid = pid tautology (which summed weight over every player).
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."weight_pounds" AS "weight_pounds_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."weight_pounds", "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
